text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's my race debut! Whoa, it sounds so cool just to
say out loud!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, we're actually here, aren't we? The
paddock's actually gonna be there when I come
out, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa! This is totally different from a
scrimmage! I'm puttin' my life on the line here!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka takes a brave step forward and looks
around the paddock. Then...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...This isn't it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's a bit off... Something's different!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Look at everyone else...

text_block_list.name: Rival Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Here we go! Pow, pow!

text_block_list.name: Rival Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
The first race, huh? This'll basically be like
practice. No biggie. ♪

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This isn't right! The debut race is supposed to be
more... dazzling!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Augh! This ticks me off! Everyone here's actin' like
it's no big deal!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Fine! I'm gonna to show 'em all what real enthusiasm looks like!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna take 'em all out, so keep your eyes
peeled!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text: Yikes! That's one cocky Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
You don't think it's all talk, right? Could you
imagine her losing after saying all that? Hah!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Trainer? Lemme ask ya somethin'.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I end up losing this to all those half-hearted
racers, will that make me the weakest?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa, seriously?! That's so lame... Like, the
lamest of lame!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I can't let that happen! I'll win this! I have to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I cheer for her as loudly as I can. Seeing her this
passionate, I believe that Vodka's really going
places!
